name: yuval-core
description: v0.12.0 — Yuval Core workspace plugin: ideation scaffolding (init, refresh-persona), code-workspace extension (init-code, write-brief, promote-to-code, report-back), SPIRIT contract (D-028), Wiki 2.0 workshop layer (D-029), wiki-aware skills (D-030), bidirectional wiki reads (D-031) — `## Cross-wiki reads` section in both memory-protocols, sister-wiki pointer in both indexes, eager-on-indexes/lazy-on-pages cadence, symmetric trigger table, sole-mount fallback. Skill-wiki contract: read freely / write narrowly / never auto-modify canonical artifacts. Karpathy-style wiki discipline with live session pages, session continuity, persona management (v2 — mode-switcher + visual-first), framework-canonical memory protocol shared by ideation and code wikis.
